Label: Enter a name for the alternative identifier field that indicates its purpose and usage.
Identifier: Enter a legacy reference code, alternative identifier, or any other alpha-numeric string associated with the archival record.
A coded designation for the copyright st: A coded designation for the copyright status of the object at the time the rights statement is archival recorded.
A condition or limitation on the act.

Add container links (duplicate links wil: Add container links (duplicate links will be ignored)
Add your digital objects by dragging and: Add your digital objects by dragging and dropping local files into the pane below, or by clicking the browse link to open your local file explorer.
Additional information about the license: Additional information about the license, such as contact persons, action dates, or interpretations. The note may also indicated the location of the license, if it is available online or embedded in the object itself.
All descendants or just digital objects: All descendants or just digital objects
Allow any valid URI PATH segment charact: Allow any valid URI PATH segment character to appear in a slug, including UTF-8 glyphs. Restricted IRI characters ( /?#{} ) and literal spaces will be replaced with dashes

An identifying designation for the statu: An identifying designation for the statute. Use standard citation form when applicable, e.g. bibliographic citation.
Any field except finding aid text: Any field except finding aid text

Check the %1% page to determine present: Check the %1% page to determine present status. You can keep moving nodes if you don't reload the page. Choosing \"Include descendants\" will in: Choosing "Include descendants" will include all lower-level archival archival records beneath those currently on the clipboard in the export.
Choosing \"Include draft records\" will: Choosing "Include draft archival archival records" will include those marked with a Draft publication status in the export. Note: if you do NOT choose this option, any descendants of a draft archival record will also be excluded, even if they are published.
Choosing \"Include non-visible elements\: Choosing "Include non-visible elements" will include those not marked as Visible Elements.
Class of material specific details area: Class of material specific details area
Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate t: Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate the start and end dates of a parent-level description. A job runs in the background, accounting for the earliest and most recent dates across all the child descriptions. The results display in the Start and End fields of the edit page.
Click Confirm to delete this physical st: Click Confirm to delete this physical storage from the system. This will also remove the physical storage location from the following archival archival records:
Clipboard saved with %1% items. Clipboar: Clipboard saved with %1% items. Clipboard ID is %2%. Please write this number down. When you want to reload this clipboard in the future, open the Clipboard menu, select Load clipboard, and enter this number in the Clipboard ID field.
Conditions of access and use area: Conditions of access and use area
Content in this area will appear below a: Content in this area will appear below an uploaded banner and above the institution's description areas. It can be used to offer a summary of the institution's mandate, include a tag line or important information, etc. HTML and inline CSS can be used to style the contents.

Determines whether to show a link to the: Determines whether to show a link to the browse hierarchy page on the information objects browse/search pages

Do not use any special characters or spa: Do not use any special characters or spaces in the filename - only lower case alphanumeric characters (a-z, 0-9) and dashes (-) will be saved. Other characters will be stripped out or replaced. Editing the filename will not automatically update the other fields.

Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Me: Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Metadata Initiative
Editing the authorized form of name will: Editing the authorized form of name will automatically update the slug field if the "Update slug" checkbox is selected - you can still edit it after.

Enable or disable the display of certain: Enable or disable the display of certain page elements. Unless they have been overridden by a specific theme, these settings will be used site wide.
Enter free-text information, including q: Enter free-text information, including qualifiers or typographical symbols to express uncertainty, to change the way the date displays. If this field is not used, the default will be the start and end years only.
Enter the ID of the saved clipboard you: Enter the ID of the saved clipboard you would like to load.
Enter the copyright end date, if known. Acceptable date format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the copyright start date, if known: Enter the copyright start date, if known. Acceptable date format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the email address(es) of at least: Enter the email address(es) of at least one administrator for the repository. Multiple addresses can be entered, separated by commas. The address(es) will be exposed as part of a response to an Identify request.
Enter the end year. Do not use any quali: Enter the end year. Do not use any qualifiers or typographical symbols to express uncertainty. Acceptable date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

Enter the end year. Do not use any qualifiers or typographical symbols to express uncertainty. If the start and end years are the same, enter data only in the "Date" field and leave the "End date" blank.
Enter the start year. Do not use any qua: Enter the start year. Do not use any qualifiers or typographical symbols to express uncertainty.
Enter the start year. Do not use any qualifiers or typographical symbols to express uncertainty. Acceptable date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

Record a citation to, and/or information: Archival archival record a citation to, and/or information about a publication that is about or based on the use, study, or analysis of the unit of description. Include references to published facsimiles or transcriptions. (ISAD 3.5.4)
Record a citation to, or information abo: Archival archival record a citation to, or information about, a publication that is about or is based on the use, study, or analysis of the materials being described. Provide sufficient information to indicate the relationship between the publication and the unit being described. This includes annotated editions. (DACS 6.4.4)
Record notes on sources consulted in pre: Archival archival record notes on sources consulted in preparing the description and who prepared it. (ISAD 3.7.1)
Record specialized or other important in: Archival archival record specialized or other important information not accommodated by any of the defined elements of description. (ISAD 3.6.1)
Record the name of the register which gr: Archival archival record the name of the register which group this archival material (Audio visual, sound, maniscripts and photographs as an example).
